content.en:
Beyond the Extreme Road.

The Abyss Palace Lord descended, and with a wave of his hand, the dense Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers Extreme Dao Creatures appeared.

Seeing this scene, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers who were in the magic circle panicked, not to mention those True Realm Perfect Controllers.

The Perfect Controllers of the Realm of the Realm are like ants in the face of these Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Realm, and they are not opponents at all.

"Abyss Palace Master, he actually came in person!!"

The Masters of the Daoless Realm and other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers all changed their faces.

It's true that the Abyss Palace Lord is too powerful, far surpassing them!

A long time ago, they fought with the Abyss Palace Lord, and a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller was directly swallowed by the Abyss Palace Lord, and was killed in an instant.

Fortunately, it was the will clone that the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm did not fall.

But this also proves that the Abyss Palace Lord is powerful, he can instantly kill an ordinary Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, and he doesn't know where the limit of his strength is.

Buzz Buzz!!

The Lord of the Golden Body, the Lord of the White Night, the Lord of Destruction, and the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao True River appeared one by one, this is their essence, the number is not much, only about a hundred, plus the other Extreme Realm Perfect Masters they invited, a total of more than three hundred.

Such a small amount is naturally far less than the many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers sent by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea this time.

Of course, there are still many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the End of the Realm, but they are not necessarily willing to start a war with the Extreme Dao Deep Sea for the sake of this magic circle.

"Abyss Palace Master, are you going to war?"

The Lord of the Golden Body asked.

"Lord of the Golden Body, we don't want to go to war, if you never build this magic circle, we will withdraw!" the Abyss Palace Lord assured.

"Impossible!"

The Lord of the Golden Body refused.

The Abyss Palace Lord sneered: "Then our Extreme Dao Abyss Palace will break your magic circle this time, and you can't stop me!"

The Golden Body Lord's face turned pale, he really couldn't stop the Abyss Palace Master.

Although his strength is very strong, he is not the opponent of the Abyss Palace Master.

The Abyss Palace Master is the most terrifying Extreme Creature with the most terrifying strength in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and his talent and comprehension are too high, and his strength is extremely terrifying.

Just when the Abyss Palace Lord was about to make a move, a figure came out of the primordial black sea.

It was this figure that made the faces of many extreme creatures such as the Abyss Palace Master change slightly.

"Lord of the Unbounded!"

Many of the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters recognized this one.

"Lord of the Boundary, you are back!" The Abyss Palace Lord didn't dare to make a move, when the Extreme Dao Deep Sea fought with the Edge of the Realm, whether it was the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm or the Extreme Dao creatures of other realms, it was far beyond the end of the Realm.

But in the final battle, it was the Extreme Dao Deep Sea that lost slightly, and the real reason for the Extreme Dao Deep Sea to lose was this Unbounded Lord.

If it weren't for the Lord of the Unbounded, it would be impossible for the Extreme Deep Sea to lose.

"Let's go!"

With a wave of his hand, the Abyss Palace Master took away the other Extreme Path creatures, and immediately escaped into the Primordial Black Sea and returned to the Extreme Deep Sea.

"Thank you, Lord of the Unbounded!"

The Lord of the Golden Body thanked.

"It's just a small thing, I'm leaving!"

The Unbounded Lord said.

Immediately, he once again escaped into the primordial Black Sea.

......

"I didn't expect the Lord of the Boundless to come back!"

"The Lord of the Unbounded has disappeared for too long, but now he has returned, no wonder the Extreme Dao True River is full of confidence!"

"If it weren't for the Lord of the Unbounded, the Extreme Dao True River wouldn't be able to keep this magic circle, and the number of those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace is too many, and we are much worse in number!"

"Yes, even if we have a clone of the will, one Extreme Realm Perfect Controller can be used for two, and we can't beat the Extreme Deep Sea! They have hidden too many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and the number of Void Realm Perfect Controllers and True Realm Perfect Controllers is countless times more than ours!"

While these Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were talking, Ye Tian sent a message to inquire about the Lord of the Ancients.

"Lord of the Ancients, what is the origin of this Unbounded Lord?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Lord of the Ancient said: "The Lord of the Boundless is the strongest person at the end of our realm, and it can even be said that he is the strongest person at the end of the Extreme Deep Sea and the end of the realm, and even the Lord of the Abyss Palace is not the opponent of the Lord of the Boundary. At the beginning, a great battle broke out between the Extreme Deep Sea and the Realm Rim, and the Unbounded Lord reversed the occupation with his own strength, killing hundreds of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and also severely damaging the Abyss Palace Lord. After that great battle, the end of our realm was able to sit on an equal footing with the Extreme Deep Sea. "

"Before, they said that the Lord of the Unbounded left and is only returning now, what is going on?" Ye Tian asked again.

The Lord of the Ancient said: "The path of the Lord of the Boundless Realm is somewhat special, so there is no will clone, he is a true body. Long ago, the Unbounded Lord escaped into the primordial Black Sea, and then vanished. Many Extreme Realm Perfect Masters speculated that the Unbounded Lord was going to constantly travel through the Primordial Black Sea to reach the deepest part of the Primordial Black Sea. Since then, there has been no news of the Unbounded Lord. Now it seems that the Extreme Dao True River has long known that the Unbounded Lord is back, so he dares to arrange such a magic circle, so as to transform the Extreme Dao True River. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

The Lord of the Boundaries returned, and the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the Boundary's Edge breathed a sigh of relief and continued to maintain the circle.

However, it was Ye Tian who was the happiest.

"This time I made a lot of money, and I copied the thirteen Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

One of the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments came from the Unbounded Lord, and the other twelve Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments came from those Extreme Dao creatures before them.

He spied into time and space, and after using his copying talent to perceive their Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, he copied it as soon as possible.

Void Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, devouring Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu......

"I've made a lot of money this time!"

Ye Tian was very happy.

Immediately, his other replica bodies began to fuse with these Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments.

It didn't take long for these Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments to become Ye Tian's talents.

Moreover, after having so many Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, he could cultivate so many Extreme Dao to the Consummation Realm, and maybe there was hope that he would advance the Endless Extreme Dao to the Dacheng Realm.

In that case, he would be able to attack the True Realm Perfect Controller Realm.

......

Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

After the Abyss Palace Lord and the others came back, their faces were very ugly.

"Abyss Palace Master, have we just given up?"

The Blood Saint Palace Lord asked.

"If you don't give up, what else can you do?" The Abyss Palace Lord said helplessly: "I knew that the Lord of the Boundless had left the end of the realm, so I dared to take you to the end of the realm and destroy the magic circle. But now that the Lord of the Bounds is back, I'm not sure. Although my strength has improved a lot over the years, just now I sensed the aura of danger, and the Lord of the Boundless is even more terrifying than before. If I fight them, I can save my life, but I am afraid you will not be able to save your life. "

The other Extreme Realm Perfect Masters Extreme Dao Creatures nodded their heads one after another, feeling that the Abyss Palace Master's choice was very correct, if they really fought, they would suffer too heavy losses, and it would be troublesome.

"That's it, even if the end of the realm transforms the Extreme Dao True River, it will be useless in a short period of time!"

After the Abyss Palace Lord finished speaking, he left.

The other Extreme Creatures also left, and this was the end of the matter.
